name: fors_sign(md, SK.seed, PK.seed, ADRS)
label: Algorithm 16

inputs.name: SK.seed
inputs.description: n-byte secret seed from SLH-DSA private key

inputs.name: PK.seed
inputs.description: n-byte public seed from SLH-DSA public key

inputs.name: ADRS
inputs.description: 32-byte address structure, type set to FORS_TREE with layer=0, tree address, and key pair address set

body_raw: for i from 0 to k - 1 do
SIG_FORS ← SIG_FORS ∥ fors_skGen(SK.seed, PK.seed, ADRS, i * 2^a + indices[i])
for j from 0 to a - 1 do
AUTH[j] ← fors_node(SK.seed, i * 2^(a - j) + s, j, PK.seed, ADRS)
